positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of glowing celestial flora and fauna set against a midnight indigo background. The composition features intricate bioluminescent mushrooms, crystalline spiderwebs connecting stylized crescent moons, and ethereal hummingbirds formed from pure stardust. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and modern cosmic geometry, utilizing rich jewel tones—deep blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples—with accents of vibrant gold leaf and glowing cyan light. The print must have clean, sharp lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast, making the central subject pop against the deep background. Ideal for repeat or large format textile printing. Full composition, symmetrical, central focus, high detail, cinematic lighting, vector illustration quality.
negative: photorealistic, low quality, blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, anime, cartoon, people, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped
